title: PageRank Development
description: Developed the PageRank search ranking algorithm with Sergey Brin while completing his graduate studies at Stanford University.

title: Co-founded Google
description: Co-founded Google Inc. with Sergey Brin, setting up Google's first workspace in a garage in Menlo Park.

title: PageRank Patent Granted
description: Google was officially granted the patent for the PageRank link analysis algorithm, listing Page as the inventor.

title: Google IPO & Marconi Prize
description: Google successfully completed its Initial Public Offering (IPO), and Page received the Marconi Prize with Brin.

title: Google CEO (Second Term)
description: Returned as Chief Executive Officer of Google, leading the expansion into Android mobile platforms and hardware.

title: CEO of Alphabet Inc.
description: Became CEO of Alphabet Inc., Google's newly formed parent company, overseeing deep tech investments.
